# Portfolio
> AI-optimized portfolio with interactive chat, auto-synced GitHub projects, and LinkedIn data.

## Sections
- / - Main portfolio with AI chat assistant
- /linkedin - LinkedIn data import page

## Person
- Name: [Set in profile.json]
- GitHub: https://github.com/[username]
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/[username]

## Data Sources
- GitHub repos: /api/github/repos
- Profile data: /data/profile.json
- LinkedIn data: /data/linkedin-data.json
